name: Lebanese Doughnuts Awwamath
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in a small amount of warm water.
2. Add yogurt, flour, and salt to the yeast mixture and mix well with an electric mixer until thick and creamy.
3. Allow the dough to rise for about 45 minutes.
4. Heat oil in a deep pot or pan.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough into the hot oil and fry until golden brown.
6. Drain the fried dough on paper towels.
7. Drizzle with syrup and serve.
